commitMessage: fix: chain dependent subtasks so backend runs before frontend
fix: surface agent explanation when no commits are made

fix: raise agent round limit to 60, add wrap-up nudge at round 50

- Bumped hard cap from 40 to 60 rounds
- At round 50, injects a user message telling the agent to commit what
  it has and stop — so partial work is preserved rather than lost
- On hitting the hard cap, does a best-effort commit before raising

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add query_table tool for Azure Table Storage access

Gives the agent read-only access to live ideas, projects, and updates
tables so it can inspect record shapes and validate assumptions before
writing code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: pass prior Q&A to clarity check to prevent repeated questions

Moves prior_updates fetch to before assess_idea_clarity so the bot
can see what was already asked and answered on previous triggers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: inject repo CLAUDE.md into clarity check and agent for better context

Bot was asking basic questions (where are ideas stored?) because it had no
codebase knowledge at clarity-check time. Now fetches CLAUDE.md from the
target repo via GitHub API before the clarity check runs and injects it into:
- assess_idea_clarity: so structural questions answerable from docs aren't asked
- run_agent system prompt: so the agent starts with architecture context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add arch-content-foundry to Bicep (GlobalStandard gpt-4o 50K TPM)

Resource was created manually and had Standard SKU at 10K TPM, causing 429s
in the arch-content-update CI workflow. Now managed via Bicep with
GlobalStandard at 50K TPM. Deployment already updated live via CLI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: decompose subtasks now assign correct project per subtask

Previously all subtasks were filed under the parent idea's project,
causing frontend subtasks to land in the wrong repo. Now:
- decompose_idea receives the full project list and includes it in the prompt
- LLM must assign an exact project_name per subtask based on which repo the work belongs to
- project_name is validated against known projects before use; falls back to parent if unrecognised
- main() uses each subtask's project_name when creating the idea in the API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: cut token pressure to reduce 429s

- bash output cap: 8000 → 2500 chars
- read_file cap: 8000 → 4000 chars
- max_tokens: 8096 → 4096 in agent + repair loops
- context window: last 30 → last 14 messages
- final retry wait: 180s → 300s

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: decompose complex ideas into sub-tasks to avoid 429 rate limits

Before the agent loop, check whether the idea is complex enough to split.
If so, create 2-4 focused child ideas (same project/repo), block the parent,
and exit. Each child runs with a small focused context — far fewer rounds.

When re-triggered after all children complete: if they were subtasks,
mark parent completed without running an agent loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: app-level 429 retry with 60s backoff on top of SDK retries

SDK max_retries=8 exhausts in ~2 min on sustained TPM limits.
_chat_complete wraps all 3 call sites with up to 4 attempts,
sleeping 60/120/180s between them before giving up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: cross-repo dependency ideas — bot blocks until deps complete

When the agent discovers work that belongs in a different repo, it can
call create_idea to file a dependency. The original idea becomes blocked
and will not push until all dependencies reach completed status.
Re-triggering checks dependency statuses and unblocks automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add blocked bot_status and bot_blocked_by field for cross-repo dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(projects): project = one repo; repos[] -> repo string

API now accepts and returns a single `repo` string per project.
Backward compat: existing entities with old `repos` JSON list have
their first entry promoted on read.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(bot): project = one repo; remove multi-repo loop

fetch_project_repo() returns a single string. Bot clones that one repo
and opens one PR. No LLM inference, no loop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(bot): handle 429 rate limits - increase retries, cap context window

- max_retries=8 lets the openai library back off and retry on 429/5xx
- timeout=120s per request (was default 60s)
- Sliding context window keeps system+user prompt + last 30 messages,
  preventing unbounded growth that drives up per-round token usage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(bot): watch GitHub Actions CI and auto-repair on failure

Replaces local npm build verification with GitHub Actions monitoring.
After creating the PR, bot polls gh pr checks every 30s until all checks
complete. On failure, fetches failed step logs via gh run view --log-failed,
spawns a targeted repair agent, pushes the fix, and waits for CI again.
Works for any language/build system configured in the repo's CI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
fix: allow machine key auth on PATCH /projects/{id}
feat: add repos field to projects, PATCH /projects/{id}, machine auth on GET /projects
feat: resolve repos from project API instead of hardcoded REPO_MAP (BOT-02)

feat: add needs_info bot status and per-run model override

- VALID_BOT_STATUSES now includes needs_info
- run-bot endpoint reads optional model from request body and passes
  AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT override to the Container App Job execution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: upgrade model default, add needs-info pre-flight and model slug in PR

- Default deployment changed from gpt-4o to o3-mini
- max_tokens raised from 4096 to 8096
- assess_idea_clarity() pre-flight check: posts a bot comment and sets
  needs_info status if the idea is too vague to implement autonomously
- fetch_updates() / post_bot_update() helpers for ideas-api updates endpoint
- Prior updates thread injected into agent context on re-trigger
- Branch name and PR title now include model slug for A/B comparison

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
feat: pass error_type and status through ErrorRow
feat: add structured logging via shared-logging

fix: skip empty github_actions results; increase run fetch to 10

When GITHUB_TOKEN is unset or the API returns nothing, fetch_github_run
returns {}. Previously this was still added to the payload, causing the
frontend to render the GitHub section with all-undefined fields (showing
— and "just now"). Now empty results are skipped so the section stays
hidden until a token is configured.

Also bumps per_page from 5 to 10 for the runs query.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prefer push/dispatch runs; add CORS OPTIONS handler

github_checks.py: pick the first run with event in (push,
workflow_dispatch, release) rather than blindly taking runs[0], which
could be a scheduled or bot run. Adds event field to the response.

function_app.py: add catch-all OPTIONS handler so browser preflight
requests get proper CORS headers (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *,
Allow-Headers: Authorization Content-Type). Fixes CORS errors in the
dashboard frontend.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add per-idea status updates (comments section)

Adds GET/POST/DELETE endpoints under /api/ideas/{id}/updates backed by
a new Azure Table Storage table. Updates table is declared in
azure-infrastructure rather than created lazily. CLAUDE.md updated to
reflect current architecture, endpoints, and infra conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add GitHub Actions run data to DashboardGetter

- New github_checks.py: fetch_github_run() calls GitHub Actions API for
  the latest non-PR workflow run; includes failed job names on failure
- registry.py: add github_repo to UPDATABLE_FIELDS and _entity_to_dict
- function_app.py: submit github_futures in the existing ThreadPoolExecutor;
  github_actions key added to DashboardGetter payload
- CLAUDE.md: document github_repo field, github_checks module, GITHUB_TOKEN

Requires GITHUB_TOKEN env var (actions:read PAT); degrades gracefully
without it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
